name: Quesadilla for Buritto Lovers
recipeIngredient: 3 small bell peppers, red, yellow, green - finely diced
12 ounces shredded Monterey jack cheese - or
6 ounces pepper jack cheese - low fat
1 1/2 cups Texas Caviar Salad - commercially blended
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add diced bell peppers and red onion, sautéing until tender, about 5 minutes.
2. Stir in the chopped shrimp and cilantro.
3. Brush one side of each tortilla with melted butter. Place the buttered side down on a baking sheet.
4. Spoon equal amounts of shrimp mixture and cheese onto each tortilla. Top with remaining tortilla, pressing gently to seal.
5. Preheat oven to 500°F (260°C). Bake quesadillas for about 5 minutes, or until lightly browned.
6. Cut into quarters and serve on plates. For canapes, cut each quesadilla into 6 wedges.
7. Serve with bean and corn salsa or pico de gallo, and shredded lettuce.
